title: [lora_l2.h:70] LICHEN_LORA_FRAME_OVERHEAD derivation comment arithmetic incorrect
description:
Gap found: lora_l2.h macro constants not reviewed in Round 1.

Why this was missed: Focus was on .c files; header macros not systematically checked.

The actual bug: Line 70 comment says '5 (header) + 4 (MIC) + 48 (signature) - 2 (margin) = 55'. But 5+4+48-2 = 55 only if we subtract 2 for margin. The comment structure is confusing - it describes the overhead as 55 bytes but the formula doesn't directly yield 55 without explanation of what 'margin' means. The actual derivation in the comment block (lines 46-66) is correct: 255 max payload, subtract 57 fixed overhead (5 header + 4 MIC + 48 sig), but then says 'rounding down to 55 provides 2 bytes margin'. This means OVERHEAD is 55, leaving 200 bytes for MTU. The line 70 formula should read '5 + 4 + 48 = 57 true overhead, using 55 (57-2) for margin' to match the prose. Minor documentation bug.
close_reason: Fixed: Corrected inline comment to match the block comment explanation. Changed from '5 (header) + 4 (MIC) + 48 (signature) - 2 (margin) = 55' (misleading arithmetic) to '57 (header+MIC+sig) rounded to 55 for SCHC rule ID headroom' (matches semantic explanation above).
